enableRangedPrompt.name: Prompt on ranged attack
enableRangedPrompt.hint: When a ranged attack targets a token, ask the target's controlling user to Evade or Tank BEFORE hit/miss is revealed (blind decision). If off, ranged attacks are left to the attacker/GM (no prompt, no auto-roll).

enableAutoMelee.name: Auto-resolve melee defense
enableAutoMelee.hint: Melee and thrown-in-melee attacks automatically roll the target's Evasion as an opposed roll, with no prompt. If off, melee is not auto-resolved.

enforceRef8Gate.name: Require REF 8+ to dodge bullets
enforceRef8Gate.hint: When on, the ranged Evade option is only offered if the target has REF 8 or higher (Dodging Bullets); otherwise Evade is disabled with a tooltip. Never affects melee.

promptTimeoutSeconds.name: Prompt timeout (seconds)
promptTimeoutSeconds.hint: Seconds to wait for the target's choice before defaulting to Tank. 0 waits indefinitely.

whisperResult.name: Result visibility
whisperResult.hint: Who can see the evasion result card.

tieGoesToDefender.name: Ties favor the defender
tieGoesToDefender.hint: On an equal opposed total the attack is dodged (Evasion >= Attack). If off, the defender must strictly beat the attack (Evasion > Attack).

autoDamage.name: Auto-roll and apply damage on a hit
autoDamage.hint: When a hit is confirmed, automatically roll the weapon's damage and apply it to the target via the system's own damage pipeline (armor ablation + HP). Runs on a GM client. Excludes grenades/rockets/thrown weapons and autofire/aimed shots; those fall back to the manual Roll Damage button. If off, damage is always rolled manually.

suppressDiwakoHit.name: Hide Diwako's hit/miss line
suppressDiwakoHit.hint: When on and diwako-cpred-additions is active, cancel Diwako's plain hit/miss chat line so it cannot spoil the result before the target chooses Evade or Tank (blind decision). Diwako's Sequencer hit/miss animations, if enabled, are not affected.

blindAttackRoll.name: Hide the attack roll from the defending player
blindAttackRoll.hint: When on, a ranged attack roll aimed at a player-controlled target is whispered to the GM and attacker only, so the defending player must choose Evade or Tank BEFORE seeing how high the roll is (anti-metagame). The numbers appear in the result card after they decide. Targets controlled by the GM (NPCs) are never blinded. Requires the ranged prompt to be enabled.

logMissingTarget.name: Log attacks with no target
logMissingTarget.hint: When on, log a console note if an attack card has no target (mirrors Diwako). Off by default to reduce noise.

prompt.title: Incoming Attack!
prompt.body: {attacker} attacks {target}. Evade or take the hit?
prompt.cannotEvade: Cannot dodge this ranged attack (needs REF 8+ and an Evasion skill).
prompt.timedOut: {target} did not respond in time - the hit stands.

result.dodged: {target} DODGED! Evasion {evasion} beats attack {attack}. Attack negated.
result.failed: {target} FAILED to evade. Evasion {evasion} vs attack {attack}.
result.missedAnyway: {target} braced to tank, but the shot missed anyway (attack {attack} vs DV {dv}). No damage.
result.meleeDodged: {target} evaded the melee attack. Evasion {evasion} vs attack {attack}. Attack negated.
result.meleeHit: {target} was hit in melee. Evasion {evasion} vs attack {attack}.
result.meleeDodgedUntrained: {target} (untrained) evaded the melee attack with a bare REF/DEX roll. {evasion} vs attack {attack}. Attack negated.
result.meleeHitUntrained: {target} (untrained, no Evasion skill) was hit in melee. Bare defense {evasion} vs attack {attack}.
result.damageAuto: Damage {damage} was rolled and applied automatically.
result.damageManual: Hit stands - attacker rolls damage via the Roll Damage button.

error.noEvasionSkill: {target} has no usable Evasion skill and could not defend.
error.noTarget: No target was selected for the attack.
error.noResponsibleUser: No connected owner or GM to resolve the defender's Evasion.
error.noSocketlib: Cyberpunk RED - Evasion Workflow requires the socketlib module, which is not active.
error.noSocketFlag: Cyberpunk RED - Evasion Workflow could not register its socket. Ensure the module manifest has "socket": true, then restart Foundry and reload the world.
error.emitFailed: Could not reach {target}'s controlling user to resolve Evasion (they may have disconnected). Resolve the defense manually.
